figure.title: OSI Reference Model to UALink Layers Mapping
figure.purpose: Maps the standard OSI 7-layer reference model to the specific layers defined in the UALink architecture.

technical_summary: OSI Application, Presentation, Session, and Transport layers map to the UALink 'Higher Layers' and 'TL' (Transaction Layer).
OSI Network and Data Link layers map to the UALink 'DL' (Data Link) layer, which includes Pacing/rate adaptation, DL-message service, Flit Packer, and Link Level Replay.
OSI Physical layer maps to the UALink PHY, which consists of the Reconciliation Sublayer (RS), PCS, PMA, and PMD.
The 64B/66B code interface connects RS and PCS. The MDI connects PMD to the physical medium.

critical_facts: UALink condenses the upper OSI layers into a Transaction Layer and maps Network/Data Link into its own specialized Data Link layer with reliability and packing functions.
